response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performer as Kobo Kanaeru using on-screen text ('#3DKobornDay2025'). 2. Listened to the song in the video and performed a lyric search for key phrases ('さあ、顔を上げて', '歩み始めなきゃ', '離したくない'). 3. Confirmed the song as 'Closing '13' (or just 'Closing') from 'WHITE ALBUM 2' through search results (e.g., YouTube playlist, lyric sites). 4. Identified original performer/artist as Rena Uehara. 5. Extracted and formatted full Japanese and English lyrics from reliable sources found during search. 6. Segmented the video into performance (song) and talk/outro (merch reveal) phases for the scene map.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual concert performance of 'Closing '13' by Kobo Kanaeru as part of her '#3DKobornDay2025' event, followed by an audience interaction segment and a merchandise reveal.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru performs 'Closing '13', originally from 'WHITE ALBUM 2'. The scene is visually stylized with clouds, a rainbow, and holographic stars.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Kaeranai hibi dakishimeta mama
Itsuka sou itsuka
Yowai kokoro ga tsukamaru mae ni
Sotto anata wo toozaketa
Aa konna kimochi tsurasugiru yo mou
Anata wa dare na no? Doko ni kakureteta no?
Hidoku obiete ru utsu muita mama no
Riaru na watashi ga matteta
Mata ano kisetsu yozora wa shiroku anata mo ite
Furete konai de ureshii kedo kokoro ga itai
Hanashitakunai hanaretakunai
Demo akirameteta
Mou kore ijou suki ni narenai
Ushinau itami taekirenai yo
Kaeranai hibi dakishimeta mama
Itsuka sou itsuka
Tada soba ni ite sore dake de ii
Sunao ni wa narenai keredo
Saa kao wo agete ayumi hajimenakya
Riaru na watashi yo kizuite
Mata ano kisetsu kono sora no shita miagete iru
Kizutsuita mono mou moto ni wa modoranai kedo
Hanashitakunai hanaretakunai
Mou akiramenai
Anata no kokoro kizutsukete demo
Kono kimochi uso wa tsukenai
Itsuka egao de hanaseru you na
Watashi wo mitsukete
Tada soba ni ite kikasete hoshii
Nidoto hitori ni wa shinai to
Kaeranai hibi dakishimeta mama
Kitto sou kitto
Ano hi no kimochi uketomenaide
Mae ni susumu koto ga dekinai
Hanashitakunai hanaretakunai
Hitotsu no negai wa
Daisuki da yo to tsutaetai dake
Honto sunao ja nai keredo
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Holding on to the days that will never return
Someday, yes, someday
Before my weak heart is captured
I quietly kept you away
Aa, this feeling is too painful, already
Who are you? Where were you hiding?
Badly frightened, still hanging my head
The real me was waiting
Again that season, the night sky is white and you are there too
Don't touch me, I'm happy but my heart hurts
I don't want to let go, I don't want to leave
But I had given up
I can't fall in love any more than this
I can't bear the pain of losing
Holding on to the days that will never return
Someday, yes, someday
Just stay by my side, that's enough
Although I can't be honest
Come on, raise your head, you have to start walking
Real me, notice it
Again that season, under this sky, I am looking up
The broken things won't return to the way they were, but
I don't want to let go, I don't want to leave
I won't give up anymore
Even if I hurt your heart
I can't lie about this feeling
Someday, looking for a me
Who can talk with a smile
Just stay by my side, I want you to let me hear
That you'll never leave me alone again
Holding on to the days that will never return
Surely, yes, surely
Don't accept the feelings of that day
I can't move forward
I don't want to let go, I don't want to leave
One wish
I just want to tell you that I love you
Although I'm not really honest

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru talks to the audience, reflecting on the performance, followed by a birthday merchandise reveal. No vocal music is playing.
